title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Reference Role: Use Image 1 as the person likeness source: same face, hair silhouette, and expression from the uploaded photo. Theme: Realistic miniature isometric sports figurine. Sport and Uniform: basketball, wearing fictional royal-blue basketball uniform with number 11 and white trim; use fictional team marks only. Action: Full-body figurine performing one-foot stepback jump shot with ball raised above forehead, with clear athletic silhouette and toy-like balance. Base: small matte circular court base with subtle three-point line, clean white background, soft shadow, centered 1:1 composition. Style: semi-realistic vinyl collectible, smooth paint, crisp shoe and jersey details, 4K crisp detail, minimal collectible presentation. Restrictions: Preserve recognizability, no real team logos unless approved, no distorted limbs, no clutter, no random text.
